# Lotto Strategy Hub

> Data-driven lottery number analysis and strategy tools — frequency statistics, hot/cold number tracking, draw history and probability-based insights. A free tool published by Local Edge Consulting.

Lotto Strategy Hub helps players explore historical lottery draw data and number patterns. It is an analytics and education tool — it does not predict winning numbers and makes no guarantee of winnings; lotteries are games of chance.

- **Site:** https://lotto-hub.localedgeconsulting.co.uk
- **Publisher:** Local Edge Consulting — https://www.localedgeconsulting.co.uk
- **Sitemap:** https://lotto-hub.localedgeconsulting.co.uk/sitemap.xml

## What it offers
- Historical draw data and frequency analysis (how often each number has been drawn).
- Hot and cold number tracking over configurable date ranges.
- Number-pattern and distribution visualisations.
- Probability and odds explainers to inform (not guarantee) selections.

## Honest limitations
- Every draw is independent and random; past frequency does not change future odds.
- This is an informational/analytical tool, not gambling advice or a prediction service.

## Related
- Local Edge Consulting (publisher): https://www.localedgeconsulting.co.uk
- BentoPDF (free self-hosted PDF toolkit): https://pdf.localedgeconsulting.co.uk
